opportunities.title: [Hiring] Async video interview on leadership experience — $30/30min
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Async video interview on leadership experience — $30/30min

Hi! I'm a master's student working on an assignment for a Leadership & Innovation course. I need to interview someone who leads or manages people at work — any scale counts. You qualify if you are: - A small business owner - A manager or team lead - An entrepreneur or founder - Anyone in a role that involves managing a team How it works: I send you the interview questions, you record a short video answering them at your own pace. No scheduling, no live call. $30, estimated effort is less than 30 mins. The rate then would

opportunities.title: Product Manager - Platform
opportunities.description: Supabase is the open-source Postgres development platform that 7M+ developers and thousands of enterprises depend on every day. We provide a complete backend solution including Database, Auth, Storage, Edge Functions, Realtime, and Vector Search. All services are deeply integrated and designed for growth. opportunities.title: Data Engineer/ Architect Consultant
opportunities.description:
Must have skills: Data Engineering/Architect with Snowflake, AWS, dbt, Python and SQL, Data Mesh.
Seeking a highly experienced Tech Lead / Senior Architect – Data Engineering to drive the design and implementation of enterprise-grade data platforms for a global engagement. This role will focus on building scalable, secure, and compliant data solutions to support advanced analytics, clinical insights, and business intelligence.

Tasks

Key Responsibilities

Lead the end-to-end architecture, design, and implementation of scalable data platforms using Snowflake.

opportunities.title: Developer of Electric Drives in the Applications & Products - Aerospace division (m/f/d)
opportunities.description:
Project description:

To support our team at a renowned customer in the aerospace sector, we are looking for a Developer of electric drives in the Applications & Products - Aerospace division (m/f/d) in a permanent position at K-tronik as soon as possible. Does that sound interesting? Then we look forward to receiving your application!

Tasks:

  • Collaboration on pre-development and development projects in the field of electric drive systems - Planning and coordination of development tasks in close coordination with the project team - Carrying out requirements
